scenario.name: Register then Call
scenario.send: REGISTER sip:[remote_ip] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: "Load Test [call_number]" <sip:user[call_number]@[local_ip]>;tag=[pid]SIPpTag[call_number] To: <sip:user[call_number]@[remote_ip]> Call-ID: reg-[call_id] CSeq: 1 REGISTER Contact: <sip:user[call_number]@[local_ip]:[local_port]> Max-Forwards: 70 Expires: 3600 Content-Length: 0

INVITE sip:service@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: "Load Test [call_number]" <sip:user[call_number]@[local_ip]>;tag=[pid]SIPpTag[call_number] To: <sip:service@[remote_ip]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 INVITE Contact: <sip:user[call_number]@[local_ip]:[local_port]> Max-Forwards: 70 Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=user[call_number] 53655765 2353687637 IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] t=0 0 m=audio [auto_media_port] RTP/AVP 0 8 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=rtpmap:8 PCMA/8000 a=sendrecv

ACK sip:service@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: "Load Test [call_number]" <sip:user[call_number]@[local_ip]>;tag=[pid]SIPpTag[call_number] [remote_to] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 ACK Max-Forwards: 70 Content-Length: 0

BYE sip:service@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: "Load Test [call_number]" <sip:user[call_number]@[local_ip]>;tag=[pid]SIPpTag[call_number] [remote_to] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 2 BYE Max-Forwards: 70 Content-Length: 0
